name: Desert Strait: Operation Online
short_description: Desert Strait: Operation Online is a team-based tactical first-person shooter based on battles in a mountain strait with various dynamically changing weather conditions and multiplayer gameplay with a focus on capturing a point.
detailed_description:
Desert Strait: Operation Online is a team-based tactical first-person shooter based on battles in a mountain strait with various dynamically changing weather conditions and multiplayer gameplay with a focus on capturing a point.

Features:


  • 2 teams of 4 player face each other in online multiplayer
  • There is a round-by-round character leveling system inside
  • Random character class and equipment
    Shooter
    Medic
    Machine Gunner
    Sniper
  • Random weather conditions in each round

  • Get experience for the supply crates, hit the capture point and get new improvements, modifications and weapons for a new level
